1.title: ☁️ Welcome to nube.tech
1.content: This is my cloud engineering notebook. SRE tools · Open Source Projects · Infrastructure as Code .

2.title: ☁️ Soy Celia.
2.content: Site Reliability Engineer with a love for quiet systems, digital art, and elegant code. SRE con pasión por la belleza silenciosa, el arte digital y el código elegante. 性靜好思，曉程序之道，勤於藝事之研。 . Work in the cloud. Live in it too. Write code quietly. Breathe quietly. In code, I find order. In systems, clarity. Yoga in the morning. Vegetables nourish me. Cleaning space is clearing mind. My dream lives far away — to study how art and technology fall in love, and become a tech-art auctioneer: so digital beauty can be seen, respected, preserved. “Nube” means cloud — simple, free, quiet, always drifting toward light. 願融藝於術，成科技藝術拍賣官； 策展數位之美，價定虛實之界。 雲者，無形而載道，游乎四海而無礙。 願如是，簡而不凡，靜而不滯。 .

8.title: Security Policy
8.content: # Security Policy ## Supported Versions Use this section to tell people about which versions of your project are currently being supported with security updates. | Version | Supported | ------- | ------------------ | 5.1.x | :white_check_mark: | 5.0.x | :x: | 4.0.x | :white_check_mark: | < 4.0 | :x: | ## Reporting a Vulnerability Use this section to tell people how to report a vulnerability. Tell them where to go, how often they can expect to get an update on a reported vulnerability, what to expect if the vulnerability is accepted or declined, etc.
